diagrams.title: Page Fault Handling Flow
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing the step-by-step process when a page fault occurs in demand paging systems
elements: OS checks if reference is valid
If no free frame: invoke page replacement
Select victim page, if modified write to disk
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the complete page fault service routine for understanding demand paging mechanism

diagrams.title: File System Architecture
diagrams.description: Layered architecture showing components from application to physical disk in file system implementation
diagrams.purpose: Understand the abstraction layers in file system design and how requests flow from user to hardware

diagrams.title: Multi-Level Page Table
diagrams.description: Hierarchical page table structure for 32-bit address space with 4KB pages, showing two-level paging
elements: Page Directory (entries point to page tables)
Page Table Entry: Frame# + Status bits
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how multi-level paging reduces memory overhead compared to single-level page tables
